interface.shortDescription: Deliver fresh, reliable data to your AI agents, analytics, and operational tools with fully autonomous ETL pipelines.
defaultPrompt: Check the status of my ELT syncs and flag any that are failing or haven't run recently
Trigger a full refresh on the [stream name] stream and let me know when it's done
Show me all my active data sources and which ones are currently syncing
Set up a new ELT sync from [source] to my warehouse, running daily
Run my [orchestration name] orchestration now and report back the result
Give me a summary of my last 10 sync runs, including any errors
